item: 3-body cast aluminum subset (canopy plate + 2 stars) A356-T6 bead-blasted
brand_or_search_term: Submit chandelier_metal_minimal.stl with the message in ASSEMBLY.md §11. Vendors: PCBWay Casting (cheapest), local US art foundry, or Xometry.
notes: Outer 13-star is 943 mm tip-to-tip — may need to be split into two halves if foundry can't handle envelope; rejoin with stainless sleeve + epoxy at install.

item: LED fiber illuminator 16 W RGBW 32-port IR remote
brand_or_search_term: AKEPO 16W RGB fiber optic light source / SANLI fiber optic illuminator RGBW 32 port
notes: Wall-wart power supply commonly included; verify before ordering.

item: End-glow PMMA fiber 1.0 mm OD 50 m roll
brand_or_search_term: 1mm end glow fiber optic cable 50m roll (VSON / AKEPO / Smart-light)
notes: Buy ~20% extra for trim losses.

item: Frosted acrylic decorative balls 12 mm (1/2 in)
brand_or_search_term: 12mm frosted acrylic balls (50–100 pack)
notes: Used as fiber-tip diffusers inside polyhedra. 31 needed; bag of 50–100.

item: Stainless 7×7 aircraft cable 1/32 in (0.8 mm) 100 ft roll
brand_or_search_term: 1/32 inch stainless steel aircraft cable 7x7 100ft
notes: 54 kg breaking strength; need ~25 m total + trim.

item: Aluminum cable ferrules 1/32 in (oval crimp sleeves) 100-pack
brand_or_search_term: 1/32 aluminum oval sleeves crimp wire rope
notes: 2 ferrules per drop, 31 drops, plus spares.

item: Hand swage / crimping tool for 1/32 in–3/32 in wire rope
brand_or_search_term: wire rope crimping tool 1.5mm aluminum sleeve
notes: One-time tool purchase.

item: Cable thimbles 1/32 in stainless 50-pack
brand_or_search_term: 1/32 wire rope thimble stainless steel
notes: Used wherever cable loops around a star tip or polyhedron eyelet.

item: M3 stainless eye bolts 50-pack
brand_or_search_term: M3 stainless steel eye bolt screws
notes: 31 needed (one per polyhedron top vertex).

item: 2 mm stainless steel cable 10 ft (structural drops)
brand_or_search_term: 2mm stainless steel wire rope 10ft
notes: Used for the 2 structural cables canopy → star centres.

item: 2 mm aluminum ferrules 10-pack
brand_or_search_term: 2mm aluminum oval crimp sleeves
notes: Pairs with 2 mm structural cable.

item: Small open S-hooks ~1 in stainless
brand_or_search_term: stainless steel S hook 1 inch small
notes: 18 needed (one per star tip); pack of ~25.

item: 8 mm (M8) A2 stainless eye bolt (top of canopy)
brand_or_search_term: M8 stainless eye bolt
notes: Hangs through cast canopy plate eye loop.

item: M3 brass heat-set threaded inserts 100-pack
brand_or_search_term: M3 brass heat set insert threaded
notes: 31 needed (one per polyhedron top vertex).

item: Heat-set insert installation tip for soldering iron
brand_or_search_term: heat set insert soldering tip M3
notes: Optional but speeds insert install dramatically.

item: Wet/dry sandpaper assortment 400 / 800 / 1500 / 2000 grit
brand_or_search_term: wet dry sandpaper 400 to 2000 grit assortment
notes: For polishing fiber-optic ends; quality of polish dominates light output.

item: Clear heat-shrink tubing 3 mm × 10 ft
brand_or_search_term: clear heat shrink tubing 3mm 10 feet
notes: Bundles cable + fiber together every ~100 mm.

item: 5-min epoxy 25 mL syringe
brand_or_search_term: Loctite 5 minute epoxy / J-B Weld ClearWeld
notes: For securing heat-set inserts and cable terminations.

item: Hot-glue gun + 4 sticks (optional)
brand_or_search_term: mini hot glue gun
notes: Optional alternative for fiber-tip diffusers.

item: Rust-Oleum Specialty Metallic spray Champagne (or Brilliant Gold / Aluminum / Burnished Brass)
brand_or_search_term: Rust-Oleum 7271830 Champagne — 'Rust-Oleum Specialty Metallic Champagne'
notes: 3 cans covers all 31 polyhedra with two passes; pick your tone.

item: Rust-Oleum filler primer grey
brand_or_search_term: Rust-Oleum 7220830 — 'Rust-Oleum filler primer'
notes: Pre-paint dust coat to kill print-line texture.

item: Rust-Oleum Crystal Clear Enamel
brand_or_search_term: Rust-Oleum 1907830 — 'Rust-Oleum Crystal Clear Enamel spray'
notes: Final clear coat — major contributor to looks-like-metal effect.

item: Hillman 50 lb swag hook (or Westinghouse 70028)
brand_or_search_term: Hillman 853641 — 'swag hook 50 lb'
notes: Ceiling mount; gives ~4× safety factor on the 13 kg chandelier.

item: 1/32 in galvanized 7×7 wire rope (or 316 stainless) 100 ft
brand_or_search_term: Wire rope 7x7 strand core 1/32 inch diameter

item: Aluminum cable thimbles + sleeves 1/32 in
brand_or_search_term: Crimp-on cable sleeves aluminum 1/32 inch wire rope

item: Brass heat-set inserts M3 × 0.5 5 mm long
brand_or_search_term: Heat-set inserts for plastics brass M3

item: 1/16 in frosted cast acrylic 24 in × 48 in sheet
brand_or_search_term: Frosted plastic cast acrylic 1/16 inch thick

item: PETG filament 1.75 mm 1 kg spool neutral colour
brand_or_search_term: Bambu Lab PETG HF / Polymaker PolyLite PETG / eSun PETG
